title: cuphea racemosa subsp. longiflora
intro: Cuphea racemosa subsp. longiflora, also known as the Mexican heather or powder puff bush, is a flowering plant that belongs to the Lythraceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe wounds and prevent infections. The health benefits of Cuphea racemosa subsp. longiflora include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Cuphea racemosa subsp. longiflora can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues and respiratory problems.
